home.subtitle: Adapt educational content to your student's universe with AI
home.emptyHistory: No adaptations saved yet. Start by clicking

dashboard.noPersonasHint: Add personas via the Manager — import from a JSON file or download from GitHub to start using the app.
dashboard.contentPlaceholder: Paste or type the content to be adapted by the persona here...
dashboard.subject: Subject
dashboard.resultPlaceholder: Select a persona, enter the educational content and click "Adapt Content" to generate the adapted result here.

personas.title: Select Persona
personas.subtitle: Choose the persona your student will connect with
personas.noResults: No personas found with these filters.

content.title: Content to Adapt
content.subtitle: Paste the test, assignment or student material
content.subject: Subject
content.placeholder: Paste the test, assignment or content you want to adapt here...
content.importFileTooltip: Import file (PDF, DOCX, TXT, MD) or image (JPG, PNG)

result.title: Result
result.subtitle: Content adapted to the persona's universe
result.manualHint: Paste the System Prompt in the AI's system field, then paste the Full Instruction as a message.
result.pdfHint: Document saved! Open the file in a browser and press Ctrl+P to generate the PDF.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure AI mode, language and preferences
settings.offlineDesc: Uses local AI on your machine. Requires Ollama installed.
settings.offlineDesktopOnly: Available only in the desktop app. Download at github.com/marlonmotta/PROMETHEUS-BRIDGE-LEARN/releases
settings.onlineDesc: Uses an external provider. API key required.
settings.manualDesc: Generates the prompt for you to paste in ChatGPT, Claude or Gemini.
settings.ollamaNotDetected: Ollama not detected. Install at ollama.com
settings.clearHistoryWarning: Are you sure? This action cannot be undone. All {{count}} adaptations will be removed.
settings.aboutDescription: PBL - PROMETHEUS · BRIDGE · LEARN - Adaptive pedagogical content system with AI.
settings.dangerZoneDesc: Restores all settings, history and favorites to their initial state.
settings.resetWarning: All settings, history and favorites will be permanently deleted. The app will return to factory state.

manager.title: Manage Personas
manager.subtitle: Manage all available personas
manager.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete
manager.deleteAllMessage: Are you sure you want to delete all {{count}} personas? You can download them again from GitHub.
manager.updateUpToDate: All up to date. No new personas in the repository.

history.title: Adaptation History
history.emptyHint: Your AI-generated adaptations will appear here. Go to the Personas screen to create your first adaptation.

errors.aiTimeout: Timeout: the AI did not respond within 60 seconds. Please try again.
errors.ocrNoText: No text was extracted from the image.
errors.ocrLoading: Extracting text from image via AI... Please wait.
errors.ocrApiHint: Check that your API key is configured and the provider supports vision.
errors.ollamaNotSupported: Ollama is not supported in the web version. Use online or manual mode.
errors.corsError: Could not connect to the provider. This may be caused by CORS blocking in the browser. Try using manual mode or the desktop version.
errors.personaInvalid: Invalid persona: meta.id and meta.display_name are required
errors.timeoutProvider: Timeout: the provider {{provider}} did not respond in 60 seconds. Please try again.
errors.importOdtInvalid: Invalid ODT: content.xml not found in file.
errors.importOdtNoText: The ODT document does not contain extractable text.
errors.importPdfNotSupported: PDF support is not available in this environment. Use .docx, .odt, or .txt.
errors.importPdfNoText:
This PDF does not contain extractable text - it is probably a scanned document (image).

💡 Solution: Open it in Word or LibreOffice, export it as .docx or .txt, and re-import.
errors.ocrPrompt: Extract ALL text contained in this image. Keep the original formatting as faithfully as possible (titles, numbering, a/b/c/d alternatives, spacing). Return ONLY the extracted text, without additional comments.
errors.importGeminiError: Could not extract text via Gemini
errors.importAnthropicError: Could not extract text via Anthropic

update.restartHint: Restart the app to apply the update.
update.error: Update failed. Please try again later.

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.description: PBL encountered an unexpected error. Your data is saved. Try reloading the application.

export.popupBlocked: The browser blocked the print window. Disable the popup blocker and try again.

dev.remoteLoadFailed: [PBL] Failed to load remote personas, falling back to cache:

dev.saveCacheFailed: [PBL] Failed to save persona to cache:
